'''Roskin''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|woman]] from [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]] who served as a sympathizer of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the early [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

She was somehow involved to a protest demonstration in the capital of [[Barons Hed]], but after the retaliatory [[Sulon massacre]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], local leader [[Morgan Katarn]] took her, her three children and hundreds of other Rebel sympathizers to an abandoned [[Space station/Legends|space station]], and later boarded the ''[[Cyclops]]'' to [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]] in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]].

She was in the first load of the two [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttles]] that brought the colonist refugees planetside. Morgan was with them and noticed how her children troubled her while they tried board through the [[airlock]]; he lifted the youngest one into his arms, offering to help her. Morgan secured the toddler into a seat, and kept him occupied with a [[multi-tool]] he was carrying.

They settled [[Fort Nowhere]]. [[Standard year/Legends|Years]] later, she was killed during a [[Battle of Fort Nowhere|ensuing battle]] in the Fort while her children remained safe.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]'' {{1st}}
